license_notes: See upstream timm model and original ResNet/U-Net license/citation terms.
remarks: This is a shape-adapted bootstrap, not an official external unet_binary checkpoint.
Run scratch-vs-pretrained comparisons before deriving conclusions.
Checksum validation should be enabled before training.
